    1. NotificationListAdapter(Context, List)

Class NotificationListAdapter

SimpleAdapter
com.example.codebase.NotificationListAdapter
public class NotificationListAdapter extends SimpleAdapter
Adapter used to populate a list of notifications in a ListView.

This class extends

invalid reference 
SimpleAdapter
to bind notification data to the layout item_notification. Each notification row displays a status and a message.

The adapter maps the keys "status" and "message" from the data source to the corresponding TextViews in the layout.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NotificationListAdapter(Context context, List<? extends Map<String,?>> data)
    Constructs a NotificationListAdapter.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationListAdapter

      public NotificationListAdapter(Context context, List<? extends Map<String,?>> data)
      Constructs a NotificationListAdapter.

      The adapter binds notification data to the UI layout used for displaying individual notification rows.

      Parameters:
      context - The current context, used to access resources and layouts.
      data - A list of maps containing notification data where each map represents a single notification with keys "status" and "message".
